description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult male figure with a beard, whose body and limbs are unnaturally elongated and twisted, merging into two large, fabric-like structures that extend diagonally. The head and partial torso are visible, but the rest of the body appears stretched and fused with the surrounding material, creating an abstract, almost surreal appearance. The surface texture resembles patterned fabric, with areas of wear and irregularity, and the figure's clothing is indistinct due to the heavy distortion. The face is relatively detailed, with discernible facial features, while the rest of the anatomy is highly deformed. The object lacks clear separation between clothing and body, and the lower limbs are particularly misshapen, blending into the base. This figure would appear out of place in a typical urban environment due to its unnatural form.
description: A heavily distorted adult male figure with a beard, partially fused with large, patterned fabric-like extensions. The body and limbs are unnaturally stretched and merged, creating a surreal, abstract appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bearded face and upper torso, with the body twisted and merging into two large, patterned extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme elongation of the body and limbs, with the head protruding from the fabric-like structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and the full extent of the twisted, merged lower body and fabric extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the face and the misshapen lower limbs blending into the base.
attribute_clothing_type: long robe or tunic with indistinct features
attribute_posture: twisted and partially fused with surrounding material
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly trimmed hair with a full beard
